code: import axios from"axios";import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import"./InventoryView.scss";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const InventoryView=_ref=>{let{onClose,userId}=_ref;const[inventory,setInventory]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchInventory=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get(`/api/inventory/${userId}`);setInventory(response.data);}catch(error){console.error("Failed to load inventory:",error);}};fetchInventory();},[userId]);const getSlotClass=item=>{switch(item.type){case"weapon":return"inventory-slot active-weapon";case"shield":return"inventory-slot active-shield";case"potion":return"inventory-slot active-potion";default:return"inventory-slot";}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"inventory-module",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"inventory-header",children:["Inventory",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"inventory-close",onClick:onClose,children:"x"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"inventory-grid",children:inventory.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:getSlotClass(item),children:item.sprite&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:item.sprite,alt:item.type,style:{maxWidth:'100%',maxHeight:'100%'}})},item.id))})]});};export default InventoryView;
